title: Policy
description: A serializable policy definition. This schema describes the structure of a policy that can be persisted, distributed, or loaded from configuration. The RolePolicy implementation in basis_core.policy.rules corresponds to a 'role_policy' type entry.

policy_id.description: Stable identifier for this policy definition.

policy_type.description: The kind of policy this definition describes.

version.description: Version identifier. Used in DecisionResponse and AuditEvent for correlation.

description.description: Human-readable description of this policy's purpose.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this policy version was created.

created_by.description: Identifier of the principal that created or last modified this policy.

rules.description: List of policy rules. Structure depends on policy_type.

action.description: Action name this rule applies to.

permitted_roles.description: For role_policy: roles that are permitted to perform this action.

conditions.description: For attribute_policy or time_window_policy: additional conditions.
